posts.text:
Here is the simple truth: 
 
The SAVE Act is a voter suppression bill.
.@SenJackyRosen's bill will make sure TSA agents get paid. Let’s get it done.

I just tried to fast track a bill to pay TSA workers NOW. 

Sadly, Republicans in DC keep blocking it. 

We all agree that TSA should be paid so what is the hold up? This is insanity.


Ella Dorsey (@Ella__Dorsey)

Y'all... I've NEVER seen Hartsfield Jackson this bad. This is what security looks like this morning (Friday). We've talked to people that got to the airport at 3am that missed their 6am flight. 
@ATLNewsFirst @GAFollowers

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Ella__Dorsey/status/2034953

This is getting lost in the conversation.

We already have laws on the books that penalize non citizens for voting with harsh penalties. 

It is exceedingly rare for this to happen, but when it does, violators are held accountable.

So if this is already on the books, what is the SAVE America Act really about?

It's all a pretext to stop AMERICANS from voting.

Specifically, Americans who dare to disagree with the President and Republicans in Washington DC.

As the holy month of Ramadan comes to a close, I want to wish the Muslim community in Georgia and across the nation a joyous and peaceful Eid al-Fitr! 
 
May peace be upon you!

If those who wanted to limit voting to only the “right people” in the 1960s had succeeded, I would not be in the Senate today.

Video

No money for your health care.
No money for hungry families.
No money for grandma’s nursing home.
No money for Elmo.
No money for cancer research.

But endless money for war.

We can’t lose sight of this. 
 
The President is currently in the process of ripping health care away from millions of Americans. 
 
It is the largest rollback of health care coverage in history.

Republicans in Washington are creating a false choice. We can pay TSA workers without more funding for a rogue, paramilitary force that is unleashing terror on our streets.

Video

Donald Trump has broken every promise he has made. It's no wonder he wants to suppress the vote.

Video

Senate Republicans just blocked my bill that would have paid TSA workers.

My Republican colleagues are saying that if you don't give the President's overgrown paramilitary force of masked agents more money, they're going to leave TSA workers and others unpaid.

I think that's patently unfair.

I’m heartbroken by the shooting at a VA clinic in Jasper, Georgia yesterday. I'm praying for the victim who was injured and wishing them a full and speedy recovery.

Keeping the Jasper community and our veterans in my thoughts. No one should face violence in a place meant for care.

Republicans in Washington are making a desperate attempt to push through their voter suppression bill. I will fight for your right to vote no matter what tricks they pull.

Video

Launching a new war.
Ripping health care away from millions.
Unleashing terror on our streets.

This President feels his support collapsing. 

That’s why he is so desperate to suppress the vote.
Did you know that Savannah's St. Patrick's Day Parade is one of the largest in America? Wishing a happy St. Patrick’s Day to all those celebrating in Savannah and across the state of Georgia! ☘️

The spiritual rot of this White House is eating at the core of our nation's highest values.

They are sending Americans to fight and die overseas while kicking people off of health care here at home.
Good news. A judge has just BLOCKED some of Sec. Kennedy’s disastrous attacks on vaccines. This is an important victory for science and for our health, but the fight continues. Keep up the pressure.

War ends with flag draped coffins.
It ends with names etched in gravestones.
And it lives on in the hearts of loved ones left behind.

We can’t lose sight of the true cost of war.
Health insurance should not cost more than your mortgage.

I don’t think families should have to take on a $31,000 deductible in order to find a health care plan they can afford.

We can do better than this.
